reviews.review_msg: Good prof overall. Make sure you keep up with your readings for this class because it really helps when he goes over it in lecture and tutorial.

This professor was amazing. Very chic and fashion-forward. His lectures are amazingly helpful and being caught up in your readings will do you loads. I really hope I get the chance to be taught by him again.

He's an alright prof, content is really dry and super easy to zone out. Some of the stuff he talks about is interesting but nothing special. Also, TAs generally mark hard. I wouldn't call this an easy class for those who aren't good in English.
Derksen successfully referenced wizards during a lecture about First Nations poetry.

fantastic and very supportive prof. he works hard for his students and challenges them to think outside their comfort zone, but he's patient. he's very engaged in his topic, but he supports students having their own interests and/or having their own thoughts, interests, and opinions. Also such a brainiac. you're lucky if you get to take his class.
he's very engaging and funny. also seems like a fair marker. one of the best english professors, i'd recommend him to anyone
Interesting, intelligent, funny, and possibly the "nicest" professor ever. Very respectful of opinions contrary to his own and seems to care about every student in the class. Highly recommended.
Derksen is a sociologist manque.  The only person dumber than him is the moron who gave him a lit PhD.  The most missable class of my career!
Jeff Derksen provided some very interesting works for us to study. He touched upon contemporary topics and made his class engaging. He seems well versed and intellectual.
Unreliable.

Graduate student? Forget about asking him to supervise you. He won't answer your e-mails or read your work for months, and doesn't give a rats ass about what happens to you after you graduate. He over promises and under delivers.  So many grad students keep working with him, and don't find out until it's too late.
Mr. Rogers impersonator!!!!
I need to get out of here
although i am not doing well in this class, i like his style of teaching.  he involves interesting culture topics into this lectures. if you're good at writing... go for it!

His lectures are boring but some of the stuff he says sometimes are quite interesting.  If you go to lecture, he will bore you with his monotone and he talks straight from the textbook and his notes.  He looks like those pale pasty guys in the Matrix that always wear a long black suit.  Contents of the course is OK, but he just makes it boring.
Great discussions and really understanding. Makes dry material interesting and easier to read.
derksen is a "hippie"? um, get your head checked -- or maybe read his books when you're finished with your new harry potter.
Very Understanding and creates great discussions for class
No Comments
he has a library
No Comments
No Comments

To the last poster, perhaps it is you who is retar(t)ed. Salt Fi(s)h Girl is a wonderful book and Jeff is a great prof. He might be a little over your head, you might want to go back to Langara, or better yet try hooked on phonics for your atrocious spelling. You are in the big leagues now.
OK prof but some of the books he chose (salt figh girl) were retarted

horrible class
 hippie prof
 for someone whos supposed to teach about globalisation.... hes so biased towards anti-gloablisation its not even funny

he's so nice, so interested in his class, so helpful, he's a published author with famous author friends who he invites for guest lectures. However, his voice is like a wissy bear stuck in a dishwasher and screaming for help. Anyway, if you get him for tutorial, he's very "fair" marker and cool guy
Very good English lecturer compared to OTHER English profs. Very clear and shows interest in Globalization. Only TA marking was hard.

thumbs up.  shows definite interest in the material and the topics covered.  lectures are skippable for the most part, but some of the stuff he makes you think about is great.  and having class-author interaction was great.  even though they're his close friends.

Everything is a process, process, process. Excited about course and has friends in the writing industry (courseware directly evidences his loyalties), but dull as a post and his intelligence is unaccessable.  Do not take this course with this professor.

interesting, you learn a lot about globalization's other perspectives. After a while you do get confused with how many times he says "globalization is a process" and "intensification between people, places, and things". Authors of coursebooks his friends- we had the opportunity to talk with them

Most boring lectures I have ever had...helpful that you can download it onlin and listen to it at home while you fall asleep. It is a process...people are poor, we are to blame...feel guilty...that's the process!

agree with all comments ... heart in the right place but so DUUUUULLL! BOOORRRIIING! Nice guy but way to turn people off globalicizationism :) Don't get ratings: everyone agrees he's dull as post, but happy faces all around! ? :(

so boring! he repeats everything he says every lecture. also, this class is more economical than anything...by the end of this course you will never want to hear the word globalization or process again!

Okay, so the lectures are a bit of a snooze occasionally, but I really like the guy! He's endearing and he seems really excited about what he's teaching. Meanwhile, his class is proof-positive that it's not necessary to work your students to death in order to teach them. I'd take his class again.

Great prof - brings up a lot of interesting ideas and really makes you think! Derksen's brilliant...have you read his poetry? All in all, 105's a great class with him....but be prepared to hear "Globalization is the ocnnection between people, places and things....it's also a process." LOL.

Good prof with great ideas, but really should refrain from reading off a piece of paper in lecture. The Globalization topic is interesting, but it's too repetitive. Everything is a process. Should explain better. TA essay marking has some unfairness. TA doesn't like it, you get a bad mark.
Interesting course but the lectures are sooooooo DULL! I am sure the guy knows what he is talking about but it is hard to stay awake in his class. Nice guy though!
Jeff is a cool guy! He makes globalization interesting.

DANG! this guy man. holy cow. everything is a freakin PROCESS in his mind! he's so crazy. although i must admit...he is nice and helpful, but dude lay off with the processes honestly! no need to keep repeating what you've said in previous lectures.

Globalization globalization globaaalllliiiiiization. Such a **** course.Lets feel bad for all the poor people in the world and feel guilty and stop shopping at GAP and drive around in cars run by olive oil and hemp products. Booooo-urns! Poetry sucks.

this dude here, he's an awesome person but a not very awesome prof.  he was my TA and my prof, so got to knoe him better and knoes dat he travels and has a life and is very open minded; however,in his lectures, beware to hear the word "globalization&
No Comments
jeff is an awesome prof. doesn't seem like a prof, more like another classmate, but more intellectual. i thought he was GREATTTTTTTTTTT! and very open to different ideas.
